## What this PR does

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat:` new public API surface
- [ ] `fix:` bug fix
- [ ] `perf:` performance improvement
- [ ] `refactor:` no behavior change
- [ ] `docs:`
- [ ] `test:`
- [ ] `chore:`
- [ ] `BREAKING CHANGE` (explain in the body)

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] `npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build` passes locally.
- [ ] Public API changes updated `skill.md` and `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] Added a regression test (for `fix:`) or behavior test (for `feat:`), or stated why a test is not appropriate.
- [ ] The server has an endpoint or response field that justifies this SDK change (link below).
